---
title: "Syllabus"
---

Weekly plan for the current course offering. Each row references authored content by its stable,
unnumbered name. Return to the [course overview](course.qmd) or browse [past years](archive.qmd).

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
| Week | Topic | Blog post | Slides | Class assignment | Home assignment | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | K-anonymity | — | — | — | — | — |
| 2 | Reconstruction attacks | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/reconstruction-attacks/post.ipynb) | [Reconstruction Attacks](../content/lecture-presentations/reconstruction-attacks/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 3 | DP as hypothesis testing | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb) | [DP as Hypothesis Testing](../content/lecture-presentations/hypothesis-testing/presentation.html) | [Hypothesis Testing Assignment](../content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/class-assignments/hypothesis-testing/assignment.ipynb) | — | — |
| 4 | Privacy auditing | [Privacy Auditing](../content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/privacy-auditing/post.ipynb) | [Privacy Auditing](../content/lecture-presentations/privacy-auditing/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 5 | Private estimation | [Private Estimation](../content/blog-posts/private-estimation/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/private-estimation/post.ipynb) | [Private Estimation](../content/lecture-presentations/private-estimation/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
| 6 | Private Estimation - cont | [Private Estimation - cont](../content/blog-posts/private-subgroup-comparisons/post.html) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/blog-posts/private-subgroup-comparisons/post.ipynb) | [Private Estimation - cont](../content/lecture-presentations/private-subgroup-comparisons/presentation.html) | — | — | — |
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED SCHEDULE -->
